source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In figure, first-order reflection from the reflection planes shown occurs when an x-ray beam of wavelength $0.260 \, \text{nm}$ makes an angle $ heta = 63.8^\circ$ with the top face of the crystal. What is the unit cell size $a_0$?

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'In figure' and refers to 'reflection planes shown'
asset_registry_record.image_manifest shows an existing image file
multi_step: question requires combining given wavelength, first-order reflection condition, and the angle with the crystal top face
likely needs geometry from the figure plus Bragg-law-style reasoning to infer plane spacing and then convert to unit cell size a0
final target is not directly read off; it appears to require multiple linked inference/calculation steps
verifiability: answer_text is a specific numeric value with unit: '0.570nm'
choices provide a closed set of 4 candidate numeric answers
registry_passed=true, so core assets are present for downstream checking

risk_flags: question_text_formula_typo_or_ocr_noise: '$ heta' appears instead of theta

decision_reasons: Core assets are present and registry passed: question text, answer, and primary image all exist.
